hero.title: Apply and get a 50% real estate tax discount for 10 years with green building certificates!
hero.description: Green building standards promote the use of renewable and recycled materials, as they have a lower environmental impact.
hero.descriptionBold: Get certified quickly, conveniently and affordably!

section.title: The leading green building certificates are LEED, BREEAM and DGNB
section.subtitle: Gain more advantages for your real estate property

benefits: Reducing environmental impact and preventing climate change
Increased energy efficiency and low operating costs
Increased property value, 50% tax discount and long-term return on investment
Compliance with Latvian legislation on environmental protection and sustainability

conditions.title: Conditions for granting benefits
items: Benefits are granted to newly built or fully renovated buildings commissioned after January 1, 2024.
No need to resubmit an application if the basis or eligibility for benefits has not changed.
Benefits are granted to all building owners if the building meets the eligibility criteria.
The discount is applied for a 10-year period, starting from the month following the building's commissioning and the certificate coming into effect.
The taxpayer must submit an application for benefits by December 15 of the tax year.

hero.title:
Construction waste recycling
and sorting in Riga
and Riga region
hero.description: SIA ''NIKA MI'' offers construction waste recycling and sorting services, using specialized sorting site equipment and cooperating with other companies in the waste utilization field.

services.title: Containers for construction waste, waste removal, utilization, sorting and recycling

card1.title: The company has its own heavy equipment fleet
card1.description: We will quickly clear your site of unnecessary waste, ensuring construction waste removal at a time convenient for you. The company has its own heavy equipment fleet, as well as specialized equipment for waste crushing and utilization.

card2.title: Full-cycle demolition works
card2.description: Works are carried out at our company's special sorting sites, as well as in cooperation with partners who provide their own utilization sites. You can order all types of full-cycle demolition works from us – after completion, the client does not need to look for other service providers for waste removal.

card3.title: NIKA MI offers comprehensive solutions
card3.description: During construction and demolition, a problem with construction waste utilization often arises. NIKA MI offers comprehensive solutions – from demolition works to construction waste recycling and sorting.

ctaBanner.title: Order construction waste removal in the most convenient way – on our website or by phone

equipment.title: Our special equipment for demolition, transportation and crushing

items.title: Excavators (16–30 t)
items.description: with breaking hammers or hydraulic shears – for building and structure demolition, as well as crushing concrete, reinforced concrete, bricks, and metal.

items.title: Containers
items.description: for transporting sorted materials for utilization.

items.title: Construction waste crushers
items.description: crushes construction waste into various fractions and separates metals (reinforcement) and other impurities.

recycling.title: Reinforced concrete and concrete recycling in Riga and Riga region
recycling.description1: After building demolition, the question of construction waste utilization often arises. NIKA MI provides reinforced concrete and concrete recycling using modern equipment and effective technologies.
recycling.description2: Works are carried out both at our sorting site and at the client's facility using a mobile crusher.
benefits: We work with reinforced concrete blocks of various sizes.
Equipment allows separating reinforcement and other impurities from concrete.
We also recycle large reinforced concrete pieces.
We prepare fractions according to client needs.
Materials obtained after recycling are reused in construction or for other needs.

hero.title:
Need to get rid of snow?
We will help!
hero.description: NIKA MI offers snow removal in Riga, Riga region, Ropaži municipality, Ulbroka and Salaspils.

territories.title: We will remove snow from your territories:

pricing.note: *Price is without VAT and includes only snow removal, without cleaning and loading.

hero.title:
Professional building demolition
in Riga and Riga region
hero.description: SIA "NIKA MI" offers demolition services, ensuring deadline compliance and accurate work execution. Apply for a consultation and receive the best solution.

about.title: NIKA MI provides professional demolition services with guaranteed quality and cleanliness
about.subtitle: We calculate costs, create a schedule and perform work within the contractual deadline

type1.title: We perform full demolition
type1.description: From building demolition to construction waste removal and utilization.

type2.title: Client-performed demolition
type2.description: We provide everything needed: equipment, containers, specialist support and work organization.

services.title: Our services:
services.subtitle: We have extensive experience with complex and hazardous objects – we safely demolish old, emergency-state buildings.
items: Full cycle: demolition → crushing → construction waste removal and recycling.
Demolition of various building types – garages, sheds, boiler houses, etc.
Demolition of bunkers and other industrial structures.
Single, two and multi-story building demolition.
Site cleanup after completion of work.
Demolition of wooden, brick, frame buildings (from roof to foundations).

hero.title:
Accumulated waste?
Drop it off at our sorting area! We will help!
hero.description: Professional construction waste sorting and recycling,

cards.title: NIKA MI sorting area accepts:

concrete.title: Monolithic concrete and reinforced concrete structures

cards.noticeText: The sorting area accepts any amount of waste, but please note that a minimum fee for 250 kg applies — this means that even if you bring 1 kg of waste, the fee will be as for 250 kg.
